response.global_analysis: Audio contains dialogue spoken by four VTuber characters (Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame, Gigi Murin, Cecilia Immergreen, Raora Fontana). Reference JSON correctly identifies this as non-vocal music. Subtitles are timed to the English speech and include specific fan names (Grambs, Rosarians, Totini, Justiciates) and mascot names (Toto, Sora, Tora, Tat). Timestamps are tightly wrapped to vocalizations.

subtitles.original: It's getting a little sad,
subtitles.english: It's getting a little sad,

subtitles.original: but it's almost time to say goodbye.
subtitles.english: but it's almost time to say goodbye.

subtitles.original: But before we go, let's each share our thoughts and thank all our fans for their support.
subtitles.english: But before we go, let's each share our thoughts and thank all our fans for their support.

subtitles.original: Uh, Gigi, you go first.
subtitles.english: Uh, Gigi, you go first.

subtitles.original: Me? Me? Okay!
subtitles.english: Me? Me? Okay!

subtitles.original: Grambs, thank you so much for supporting us all this time!
subtitles.english: Grambs, thank you so much for supporting us all this time!

subtitles.original: And can you believe it's been a little over a year now?
subtitles.english: And can you believe it's been a little over a year now?

subtitles.original: And so many more years with Justiciates, Justice, and Grambs! Yay!
subtitles.english: And so many more years with Justiciates, Justice, and Grambs! Yay!

subtitles.original: Gosh, we... Hello!
subtitles.english: Gosh, we... Hello!

subtitles.original: Thank you so much!
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: Gosh, Rosarians, give me a mighty huzzah!
subtitles.english: Gosh, Rosarians, give me a mighty huzzah!

subtitles.original: We did it! Oh my gosh, thank you so much for joining all of us on our adventure here at Holo!
subtitles.english: We did it! Oh my gosh, thank you so much for joining all of us on our adventure here at Holo!

subtitles.original: I can't... I can't believe it! Oh my gosh, we're 3D now!
subtitles.english: I can't... I can't believe it! Oh my gosh, we're 3D now!

subtitles.original: And we're going to be in a concert, and... oh... everything's happening!
subtitles.english: And we're going to be in a concert, and... oh... everything's happening!

subtitles.original: Like all our dreams are coming true, and it's all thanks to you guys!
subtitles.english: Like all our dreams are coming true, and it's all thanks to you guys!

subtitles.original: Thank you so, so much!
subtitles.english: Thank you so, so much!

subtitles.original: Onwards and upwards! Huzzah!
subtitles.english: Onwards and upwards! Huzzah!

subtitles.original: Thank you very much! Thank you so much, everyone!
subtitles.english: Thank you very much! Thank you so much, everyone!

subtitles.original: Thank you Justiciates! Thank you Toto! Thank you everyone!
subtitles.english: Thank you Justiciates! Thank you Toto! Thank you everyone!

subtitles.original: Thank you Justice, of course!
subtitles.english: Thank you Justice, of course!

subtitles.original: It's been a lot of fun, we worked very hard, and I'm so excited and happy that you all got to see it finally!
subtitles.english: It's been a lot of fun, we worked very hard, and I'm so excited and happy that you all got to see it finally!

subtitles.original: And we're also really excited to be in the EN 3D concert, so yeah!
subtitles.english: And we're also really excited to be in the EN 3D concert, so yeah!

subtitles.original: Thank you from the bottom of our heart for supporting us thus far!
subtitles.english: Thank you from the bottom of our heart for supporting us thus far!

subtitles.original: Please keep supporting us for much, much longer! Thank you!
subtitles.english: Please keep supporting us for much, much longer! Thank you!

subtitles.original: Ciao, Totini! Sora, Tora, Tat!
subtitles.english: Ciao, Totini! Sora, Tora, Tat!

subtitles.original: Thank you so much for supporting Justice for a whole year and many more to come!
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for supporting Justice for a whole year and many more to come!

subtitles.original: This... this has been a dream come true for me, being in 3D, dancing with you guys!
subtitles.english: This... this has been a dream come true for me, being in 3D, dancing with you guys!

subtitles.original: So much fun, so I really, really appreciate it.
subtitles.english: So much fun, so I really, really appreciate it.

subtitles.original: Thank you so much from the bottom of my heart.
subtitles.english: Thank you so much from the bottom of my heart.

subtitles.original: Big Cat Means Big Justice! With Justice! Way!
subtitles.english: Big Cat Means Big Justice! With Justice! Way!

subtitles.original: Once again, thank you all for watching our very first 3D collab stream today!
subtitles.english: Once again, thank you all for watching our very first 3D collab stream today!

subtitles.original: Please keep supporting Justice!
subtitles.english: Please keep supporting Justice!

subtitles.original: Justice! Just like that!
subtitles.english: Justice! Just like that!

subtitles.original: Justice! Get, get, get!
subtitles.english: Justice! Get, get, get!

subtitles.original: Justice!
subtitles.english: Justice!

subtitles.original: Bye-bye everyone!
subtitles.english: Bye-bye everyone!

subtitles.original: Make sure to eat-y noms, hydrate, and all that jazz!
subtitles.english: Make sure to eat-y noms, hydrate, and all that jazz!

subtitles.original: All right, bye!
subtitles.english: All right, bye!
